signals.headline: Ceasefire Holds Despite Violations and Escalation | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ceasefire Holds Despite Violations and Escalation | YES | MED confidence**

The two-week ceasefire announced April 7 remains technically in place, though fragile[4][5]. Iran allegedly violated the ceasefire's initial terms by not opening the Strait of Hormuz as promised[4]. However, there have been no attacks on US Navy vessels, though drones have targeted Bahrain[4].
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?

signals.headline: US Enforces Hormuz Blockade; Iran Threatens Retaliation | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Enforces Hormuz Blockade; Iran Threatens Retaliation | YES | HIGH confidence**

The United States has imposed a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz with a dozen ships to curb Iran's oil exports[3]. The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps has warned of "new methods of warfare" and threatened that "no port in the wider Gulf region would be safe from their strikes if Iranian shipping is interfered with

signals.headline: Second Round of Talks Proposed Before Ceasefire Expires | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Second Round of Talks Proposed Before Ceasefire Expires | YES | MED confidence**

Pakistan has proposed hosting a second round of direct US-Iran talks in the coming days, before the current ceasefire expires early next week[4]. The first talks in Islamabad ended without a deal, with the US emphasizing the need for nuclear material removal from Iran[1].

signals.headline: Ethereum ETFs Record Fourth Straight Day of Inflows ($53
signals.raw:
Ethereum ETFs Record Fourth Straight Day of Inflows ($53.1M on April 14)** | **YES** | **HIGH**  
US spot Ethereum ETFs saw $53.1 million in net inflows on April 14, led by Fidelity’s FETH ($38M) and BlackRock’s ETHA ($10.49M), marking four days of $212M total and ETH briefly hitting $2,400—its first since February—amid improved risk sentiment.[1]
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 15, 9:40AM-9:45AM ET

signals.headline: Senator Lummis Confirms US Crypto Market Structure Bill Nears Approval with April Markup** | **YES** | **MED**
signals.raw:
Senator Lummis Confirms US Crypto Market Structure Bill Nears Approval with April Markup** | **YES** | **MED**  
At the DC Blockchain Summit, Sen. Cynthia Lummis stated the legislation is closer to approval than ever, with a stablecoin yield compromise clearing hurdles and markup expected post-Easter recess, potentially boosting ETH and XRP via regulatory clarity.[3]
matched_markets: XRP Up or Down - April 16, 7:20AM-7:25AM ET

signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Stakes 70,000 ETH ($143M), Easing Supply Pressure** | **YES** | **MED**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Stakes 70,000 ETH ($143M), Easing Supply Pressure** | **YES** | **MED**  
The Ethereum Foundation staked 70,000 ETH, reducing sell-side pressure alongside record WETH network growth (32,058 new wallets, 46,650 active)—early bullish signals as ETH trades ~$2,184-$2,290.[2][7]
